utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes entries for all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided as 'Prague, Czech Republic' (fully specified). 2) travel_dates: given as 'May 5-9 or September 15-19' which is not a single specific date range; it provides two options, so not fully specified. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; package has 'Standard Airline, Economy Class' and cost €800 but lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, times). Not fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; provided 'Tranquil Inn', nights 5, cost €500; acceptable though lacks address but generally meets hotel selection with cost. 5) activities: selected activities with costs; two activities listed with costs; acceptable. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; dining €260 provided; acceptable. 7) total_budget: '€1700' but requirement is 'complete cost breakdown'; only total is given, no itemized breakdown summing components. Not fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 4 out of 7.
